# Sub-Level 36.2

### **Description**

This level provides maximum support using visual place value representations and simple number sequences. 

Students identify hundreds, tens, and ones through pictures and complete straightforward counting activities.

## **Sections**

### **Section A: Count Hundreds, Tens & Ones**

Picture:

🟩🟩🟩

🟦🟦

🔵🔵🔵🔵

Write the number.

### **Section B: Match Place Value**

Picture → Number

### **Section C: Missing Number**

501 \_\_ 503

610 \_\_ 612

### **Section D: Complete Sequence**

700, 701, \_\_\_

850, \_\_\_, 852
